channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Philippine police file criminal complaints against VP Sara Duterte and her security aides
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Philippine police officials on Wednesday filed criminal complaints against Vice President Sara Duterte and her security staff for allegedly assaulting and disobeying orders from authorities in a recent altercation in Congress.
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Israel and Lebanon's Hezbollah start a ceasefire after nearly 14 months of fighting
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — Israel and Lebanon-based Hezbollah militants began a ceasefire Wednesday in a major step toward ending nearly 14 months of fighting as a region on edge wondered whether it will hold.
item.dc:creator: JOSEF FEDERMAN, KAREEM CHEHAYEB and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Long-sought court ruling restores Oregon tribe's hunting and fishing rights
item.description: The Confederated Tribes of Siletz Indians in Oregon have just celebrated newly lifted restrictions on their rights to hunt, fish and gather.
item.dc:creator: Claire Rush, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: World's oldest man has died in England at 112
item.description: John Alfred Tinniswood was born a few months after the sinking of the Titanic and lived through two world wars.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Rudy Giuliani draws rebuke for a courtroom outburst accusing judge in assets case of being unfair
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In an angry outburst in a New York courtroom, Rudy Giuliani accused a judge Tuesday of making wrong assumptions about him as he tries to comply with an order requiring him to turn over most of his assets to two election poll workers who won a libel case against him. U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Police say FBI agent sexually assaulted 2 women after promise of free tattoos, modeling
item.description: GAITHERSBURG, Md. (AP) — An FBI agent charged in Maryland with sexually assaulting two women contacted his alleged victims through social media with a promise to give them free tattoos and modeling work, police said Tuesday as they encouraged other potential victims to come forward.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How Trump's bet on voters electing him managed to silence some of his legal woes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One year after the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol attack, Attorney General Merrick Garland said the Justice Department was committed to holding accountable all perpetrators “at any level” for “the assault on our democracy.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump vows tariffs over immigration. What the numbers say about border crossings, drugs and crime
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is threatening tariffs on Mexico and Canada as he seeks to portray them as responsible for illegal immigration and drug smuggling.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Santana, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Walmart's DEI rollback signals a profound shift in the wake of Trump's election victory
item.description: Walmart’s sweeping rollback of its diversity policies is the strongest indication yet of a profound shift taking hold at U.S. companies that are re-evaluating the legal and political risks associated with bold programs to bolster historically underrepresented groups in business.
item.dc:creator: Alexandra Olson And Cathy Bussewitz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tim Walz accepts turkey presentation as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — As feathers flew, Tim Walz accepted the symbolic presentation of a turkey Tuesday as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor following the Harris-Walz ticket's defeat in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oregon hiker, 61, vanishes with her 2 dogs
item.description: A search is underway for Susan Lane-Fournier, a 61-year-old hiker who vanished near Welches, Oregon, late last week, the local sheriff's office said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel approves proposed ceasefire with Lebanon's Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Tuesday recommended his Cabinet approve a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: JOSEF FEDERMAN, KAREEM CHEHAYEB and BASSEM MROUE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Drought is causing saltwater to creep up the Delaware River. Here's what's being done about it
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — Salty oceanwater is creeping up the Delaware River, the source for much of the drinking water for Philadelphia and millions of others, brought on by drought conditions and sea level rise, and prompting officials to tap reservoirs to push the unpotable tide back downstream.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI and BRITTANY PETERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mexican cattle imports suspended after New World screwworm detected
item.description: Mexico’s chief veterinary officer said they discovered the screwworm in a cow at an inspection checkpoint close to the border with Guatemala.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Virginia pilot, dog killed in New York plane crash; 2 other dogs found alive
item.description: A Virginia pilot and a rescue dog he was transporting were killed after a plane he was flying crashed in New York on Sunday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Gable, ABC 4

item.title: Uber driver killed in road rage shooting on Las Vegas Strip
item.description: An Uber driver is dead after he was shot in the neck during a road rage incident on the Las Vegas Strip.
item.dc:creator: Linsey Lewis, NewsNation

item.title: Missing man's body found on roof of California business
item.description: A man who was hired to do work on the roof of a California business died while on the job and his body was believed to be on top of the building for several days, including during a popular street fair.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tank explodes, catches fire near GM facility in Michigan
item.description: A tank containing byproducts from oil drilling operations exploded and caught fire Tuesday near the General Motors Proving Ground in southeastern Michigan, damaging two nearby homes but causing no injuries, a fire chief said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 5 takeaways as Trump rounds out his second Cabinet
item.description: President-elect Trump is rounding out his Cabinet just a few weeks after securing a second White House term, filling the top jobs that will carry out his agenda in the years to come.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Repealing no-fault divorce has so far stalled across the US. Some worry that'll change under Trump
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Married couples across the U.S. have had access to no-fault divorce for more than 50 years, an option many call crucial to supporting domestic abuse victims and key to preventing already crowded family courts from drowning in complicated divorce proceedings.
item.dc:creator: KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's 'border czar' pick says he's willing to put Denver mayor 'in jail' over deportation position
item.description: "But, look, me and the Denver mayor, we agree on one thing. He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida authorities find missing 7-year-old boy dead
item.description: Florida deputies are searching for a 7-year-old boy out of Deltona who ran from his home on Monday evening.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: Menendez brothers' resentencing request hearing pushed back to January
item.description: The Menendez brothers have waiting nearly three decades, and now they'll have to wait a little longer to hear their fates.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart becomes largest company to roll back diversity, equity and inclusion policies
item.description: Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, is rolling back its diversity, equity and inclusion policies, joining a growing list of major corporations that have done the same after coming under attack by conservative activists.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 24-year-old man dies while hanging Christmas lights at California home
item.description: A 24-year-old man died by electrocution while installing Christmas lights on the roof of a home in Southern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, WGN 9

item.title: Prominent businessman charged with homicide in teen girl's boat death
item.description: A Florida real estate developer facing a homicide charge turned himself in to authorities two years after his involvement in a 2022 boat crash killed a teenage girl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Special counsel moves to dismiss election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith asked a federal judge on Monday to dismiss the case accusing President-elect Donald Trump of plotting to overturn the 2020 election, citing longstanding Justice Department policy shielding presidents from prosecution while in office.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Jack Smith files to drop Jan. 6 charges against Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith has filed a motion to drop all four felony charges against President-elect Donald Trump in connection with his effort to overturn his 2020 presidential election in the lead-up to the deadly Jan. 6 attack on the U.S Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly and Ken Dilanian, NBC News, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden pardons turkeys Peach and Blossom for his last Thanksgiving event
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday pardoned the turkeys Peach and Blossom for the traditional presidential pardon ahead of Thanksgiving, which marks the start of Biden’s last holiday season at the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Father of Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles found dead near LAX
item.description: Ryan Kobayashi, father of a 31-year-old Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles nearly two weeks ago, was found dead near Los Angeles International Airport early Sunday morning, officials confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, WGN 9

item.title: Should sex abuse evidence set the Menendez brothers free? A judge will decide
item.description: A judge will decide Monday whether new evidence warrants a re-examination of the convictions of Erik and Lyle Menendez in the shotgun murders of their parents in their Beverly Hills home more than 30 years ago.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: GOP senators squirm over sex-related allegations against Trump Cabinet picks
item.description: Republican senators are squirming over the rash of sexual misconduct allegations against President-elect Donald Trump's Cabinet picks, which they fear will become a focal point of Senate confirmation hearings next year.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, ABC 4

item.title: New Zealanders save more than 30 stranded whales by lifting them on sheets
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — More than 30 pilot whales that stranded themselves on a beach in New Zealand were safely returned to the ocean after conservation workers and residents helped to refloat them by lifting them on sheets.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Salad topping sold in 22 states — including Utah — recalled over wrong ingredient
item.description: The packagers should contain tortilla strips but instead, consumers have found crispy onion strips inside.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart executive says some prices might rise if Trump's tariffs take effect
item.description: A Walmart executive warned that President-elect Trump’s plans to raise tariffs on imports could drive the retail giant to increase the price of store items.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, ABC 4

item.title: A man called 911 for help during a home invasion. Las Vegas police fatally shot him
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A Las Vegas man called for police help during a home invasion before an officer fatally shot him, according to authorities and 911 calls. Brandon Durham called 911 early Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MAP: Every state's favorite Thanksgiving side, according to Campbell's
item.description: The Thanksgiving turkey won’t be the star of the show in some households this holiday season, according to a recent study.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, WFLA, NBC
